# Stillwater

> Stillwater is a self-hosted web application for managing artist and composer
> metadata (NFO files) and images for Emby, Jellyfin, and Kodi media servers.
> It is API-first (REST at `/api/v1/`), built in Go with HTMX and Templ, runs
> as a single binary or Docker container, and stores its state in pure-Go
> SQLite.

## Docs

- [Project site](https://sydlexius.github.io/stillwater/): user guide, installation, troubleshooting
- [README](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/README.md): quick start, install instructions
- [Architecture decisions](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/docs/architecture-decisions.md): durable design choices
- [Developer setup](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/docs/dev-setup.md): build, test, contribute
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): PR workflow, code style, labels
- [Code of conduct](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): community standards

## API

- [OpenAPI specification](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sydlexius/stillwater/main/internal/api/openapi.yaml): full REST API contract
- [API reference](https://sydlexius.github.io/stillwater/api/): rendered Redoc UI

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater): source, issues, releases
- [Project instructions for Claude Code](https://github.com/sydlexius/stillwater/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): codebase conventions

## Capabilities

- Read and write artist and composer NFO metadata files
- Fetch, crop, and organize artist images (thumb, fanart, logo, banner)
- Pull metadata from MusicBrainz, Fanart.tv, AudioDB, Wikipedia, Wikidata, Spotify, Discogs, Last.fm, and Deezer
- Connect to Emby, Jellyfin, and Lidarr libraries with API key auth
- Configurable rule engine (Bliss-inspired) with per-rule manual or auto modes
- Session-based authentication with API tokens for automation
- Webhook notifications and SSE event streams
